function: () => { const nav = performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0]; const paint = performance.getEntriesByType('paint'); const res = performance.getEntriesByType('resource'); const byType = {}; res.forEach(r => { const k = r.initiatorType || 'other'; if(!byType[k]) byType[k] = {count:0, bytes:0}; byType[k].count++; byType[k].bytes += r.transferSize || 0; }); const large = res.map(r => ({name: r.name.split('/').pop().split('?')[0], type: r.initiatorType, size: r.transferSize, dur: Math.round(r.duration)})).sort((a,b) => (b.size||0) - (a.size||0)).slice(0, 15); return JSON.stringify({ nav: nav ? { ttfb_ms: Math.round(nav.responseStart - nav.requestStart), domContentLoaded_ms: Math.round(nav.domContentLoadedEventEnd - nav.startTime), loadEvent_ms: Math.round(nav.loadEventEnd - nav.startTime), domInteractive_ms: Math.round(nav.domInteractive - nav.startTime), encodedBodySize: nav.encodedBodySize, decodedBodySize: nav.decodedBodySize, transferSize: nav.transferSize } : null, paints: paint.map(p => ({name: p.name, startTime_ms: Math.round(p.startTime)})), resourcesCount: res.length, byType, topLargeResources: large }, null, 2); }
